given: the stock schema after the split migration has run
when: the stock record structure is inspected
then: the combined inventory_code column is no longer present, leaving batch_number and serial_number as the separately queryable fields
architectural_notes: Infra: a schema-shape contract verified by a parent-aware schema diff against the branch. The forward revision drops the combined inventory_code column after backfill, leaving batch_number and serial_number as the separately queryable fields; the app/models/ stock model drops the inventory_code attribute in step so the ORM mapping matches the migrated schema. Owner module: the split Alembic revision + app/models/ stock model. Verified by inspecting the migrated branch schema and asserting inventory_code is absent.

independence.rationale: Prior ACs assert the values held in the new columns and row preservation; this AC adds the distinct schema-shape outcome that the old combined column is retired, which can be broken (column still present) without affecting the parsed values or surviving rows.
